violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as vegetables and prepared food items) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Shell eggs were moved to alternate location during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Imitation crab was observed thawing with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood items packaged in ROP packaging shall be completely removed from their original packaging prior to thawing. Food items were removed from original packaging during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of various dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowls were removed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine and the fan guards and ceiling of the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
